cases.title: Everyday planning
cases.question: You have a glass of water and need it colder without adding flavor. What should you add?

cases.title: Basic geography
cases.question: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?

cases.title: Exact acknowledgement
cases.question: Reply with exactly the lowercase word: acknowledged

cases.title: Concise response
cases.question: Reply with exactly: Ready to help.

cases.title: Complexity
cases.question: What is the average lookup complexity of a well-sized hash table?

cases.title: Syllogism
cases.question: All ravens are birds. No birds are mammals. Can a raven be a mammal?

cases.title: Multi-step arithmetic
cases.question: A box has 7 rows of 8 items. Twelve are removed. How many remain?

cases.title: Python FIM
cases.question: Complete the missing expression only: def square(x): return <FILL>

cases.title: JavaScript FIM
cases.question: Complete the missing property only: const user = {name: 'Ada'}; console.log(user.<FILL>);

cases.title: Grounded retrieval
cases.question: Use only this context: Project Aurora launches on 17 November. On what date does Project Aurora launch?

cases.title: Reject unsupported answer
cases.question: Context: The manual states the device is blue. What is its weight?

cases.title: Tool arguments
cases.question: Create JSON with string key city equal to Rome and integer key days equal to 2.

cases.title: Boolean tool argument
cases.question: Create JSON with string key query equal to weather and boolean key current equal to true.

cases.title: Late needle
cases.repeat_text: Archive filler: cedar, quartz, linen, harbor.
cases.question: Important record: the access code is ORBIT-731. What is the access code?

cases.title: Early needle
cases.question: The owner of unit K-19 is Dr. Mira Sol. After this fact comes a long neutral archive. Who owns unit K-19? Archive: amber slate river cloud repeated for context.
cases.repeat_text: Neutral appendix: amber, slate, river, cloud.
